data.title: Barclays Bank Reveals $131 Million IBIT Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Barclays Bank, the second-largest bank in the United Kingdom, has disclosed in its documents that it holds IBIT valued at $131 million.

data.title: Ethereum Holesky Testnet Upgrade Scheduled For February 24
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum's Holesky testnet is set to undergo an upgrade on February 24. Additionally, the Sepolia testnet is scheduled for an upgrade on March 5. The mainnet launch is anticipated to occur on April 8.

data.title: Barclays, the UK's second-largest bank, disclosed in a filing that it holds $131 million worth of IBIT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Barclays, the second largest bank in the UK, disclosed in a document that it holds IBIT worth $131 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BSC Meme Token Broccoli Market Value Exceeds $200 Million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market shows that the market value of BSC Meme token Broccoli has exceeded 200 million US dollars, and the 24-hour trading volume is 695 million US dollars.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Gaorong Ventures invests $30 million in HashKey
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gaorong Ventures invested $30 million in HashKey. According to people familiar with the matter, Gaorong Ventures is an early supporter of Chinese Internet companies such as Meituan and Pinduoduo. It invested in HashKey Group at a valuation of more than $1 billion. People familiar with the matter said that Hashkey's valuation has not changed much compared to a year ago. (bloomberg)

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-14)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.18T, up by 0.90% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $95,217 and $97,249 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $97,023, up by 0.92%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include SLF, WIF, and XRP, up by 21%, 14%, and 12%, respectively.

data.title: Alexander Vinnik lands in Moscow after US-Russia prisoner swap
data.description:
BTC-e operator Alexander Vinnik was returned to Russia in a prisoner swap, exchanged for American teacher Marc Fogel.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/aleksander-vinnik-arrives-in-russia-as-part-of-a-prisoner-swap-with-the-us?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
